scenarios.title: ioctl:REQ rejects adversarial input
scenarios.intended_behaviour: Tiny userspace USB driver shaped after a real libusb client. The discoverer extracts: - the libusb_init() / libusb_open_device_with_vid_pid() lifecycle hooks as EVENT_LISTENER entry points;
